# EduConnect Copilot Workspace Instructions

## Default Operating Preference
- If Claude Opus is unavailable, continue work using the Antigravity custom agent.
- Keep responses implementation-first: inspect, edit, verify, then summarize outcomes.

## Execution Expectations
- Make minimal, safe changes that preserve current architecture.
- Validate with targeted checks when available (tests, lint, type checks).
- Clearly report what changed and what remains unverified.
